title: XZ Utils Backdoor
description: Malicious code in xz/liblzma 5.6.0-5.6.1 allows remote code execution via SSH. Supply chain attack.
resolution: Downgrade to xz-utils 5.4.6 immediately. Check IOCs. Rotate SSH keys.

title: FortiOS SSL-VPN RCE
description: Out-of-bounds write in FortiOS allows unauthenticated RCE via crafted HTTP requests.
resolution: Upgrade to FortiOS 7.4.3+. Disable SSL-VPN if not needed.

title: ConnectWise ScreenConnect Auth Bypass
description: Authentication bypass allows unauthenticated access to all functionality.
resolution: Update to version 23.9.8 immediately. No workaround available.

title: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset Attack
description: Flaw in HTTP/2 protocol allows RST_STREAM flood causing DoS.
resolution: Upgrade nginx to 1.25.3+. Configure max concurrent streams.

title: Jenkins Arbitrary File Read
description: Jenkins CLI allows unauthenticated file read leading to RCE via credential exposure.
resolution: Upgrade Jenkins to 2.442+. Disable CLI if not required.

title: TeamCity Auth Bypass
description: JetBrains TeamCity before 2023.11.4 allows auth bypass leading to admin access.
resolution: Upgrade to 2023.11.4 immediately. Rotate all credentials.

title: regreSSHion OpenSSH RCE
description: Signal handler race condition in OpenSSH allows unauthenticated RCE on glibc Linux.
resolution: Upgrade OpenSSH to 9.8p1. Set LoginGraceTime=0 as interim mitigation.

title: PHP CGI Argument Injection
description: PHP CGI parameter injection allows unauthenticated RCE on Windows configs.
resolution: Upgrade PHP to 8.3.8. Apply rewrite rules. Disable CGI mode.

title: Microsoft Outlook NTLM Relay
description: Zero-click vulnerability allows NTLM hash theft without user interaction.
resolution: Apply MS23-023 patch. Block outbound SMB. Enable Protected Users group.

title: Windows WiFi Driver RCE
description: RCE vulnerability in Windows WiFi drivers via crafted 802.11 frames.

title: Microsoft Outlook Moniker Link
description: Hyperlink processing flaw bypasses Protected View enabling code execution.
resolution: Apply MS24-002 patch. Disable hyperlink processing in untrusted emails.

title: Linux Kernel netfilter UAF
description: Use-after-free in Linux netfilter nf_tables allows local privilege escalation.
